positive: A highly detailed, stylish graphic design illustration featuring a mystical, stylized celestial forest grove. The central element is a majestic, bioluminescent stag standing in a clearing, surrounded by oversized, fantastical flowers and intertwined roots. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and intricate tattoo flash, with strong linework and geometric symmetry. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, vibrant teal, metallic gold accents, and touches of ethereal lavender. The composition must be centered and balanced, designed to look excellent when printed on fabric. Include negative space to enhance the graphic impact. Vector art style, clean silhouette, dramatic backlighting from the glowing forest, high resolution, suitable for screen printing.
